tools.name: project.dev_up
tools.description: Start the repo's isolated dev environment (DB + API server + Vite frontend on free ports). Pass --no-vite to skip the frontend.

tools.name: project.dev_down
tools.description: Stop the repo's dev environment and remove its database container.

tools.name: project.dev_status
tools.description: Show which dev services are running and their ports.

tools.name: project.dev_logs
tools.description: Show recent API server logs from the dev environment.
